message: ci: avoid intel mac runner bottleneck br-lopoh.4

files.patch:
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ jobs:
             target: aarch64-apple-darwin
             artifact: fwc
             asset: fwc-darwin-arm64
-          - os: macos-13
+          - os: macos-14
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
             artifact: fwc
             asset: fwc-darwin-amd64
@@ -119,7 +119,7 @@ jobs:
           - os: macos-14
             target: aarch64-apple-darwin
             suffix: darwin-arm64
-          - os: macos-13
+          - os: macos-14
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
             suffix: darwin-amd64
           - os: windows-latest
